name: FullStaQD MLIR
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y cmake ninja-build clang clang-tools gcc g++ curl zstd git zlib1g-dev && curl -LsSf https://github.com/munich-quantum-software/setup-mlir/releases/latest/download/setup-mlir.sh | bash -s -- -v 22.1.0 -p /opt/llvm
